allow: Bash(node -e "const l=require\('lucide-react'\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(l\).slice\(0,15\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('has Wallet:', !!l.Wallet, '| has TrendingUp:', !!l.TrendingUp, '| has Sparkles:', !!l.Sparkles\)")

PowerShell($pages = @\('/', '/accounts', '/copilot'\); foreach \($p in $pages\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $hasErr = $r.Content -match 'Internal Server Error|__next_error__'; Write-Output "$p -> $\($r.StatusCode\) errorMarker=$hasErr length=$\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Output "$p -> FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

Bash(curl -s -N --max-time 60 -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/copilot -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"rate":86.5,"holdings":[{"nickname":"HDFC NRO Savings","institution":"HDFC Bank","accountType":"nro","country":"IN","balanceUsd":0,"balanceInr":1200000,"isPfic":false,"source":"manual"},{"nickname":"Chase Checking","institution":"Chase","accountType":"checking","country":"US","balanceUsd":42000,"balanceInr":0,"isPfic":false,"source":"manual"}],"messages":[{"role":"user","text":"Do I need to file FBAR this year? One short paragraph."}]}')
